eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lyon; Mineral; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; Carson City; Elko; Douglas; Churchill, NV; at 9:00 PM on MAY 8, 2019 Effective until 10:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
